states.line: Dr. A. Cula. Speak to Mr. Pig first. He needs to vent his panic before we can address the procedural realities.

lines: Dr. A. Cula. You're here. Mr. Pig has already briefed you on the emotional state of the firm. Let us discuss the legal state.
We are defending a client who believes an invoice is a philosophical suggestion.
I need you to review the case binder and gather the necessary memos before we approach the bench.

states.line: I will not discuss strategy until you have retrieved the procedural binder from the archive. We need facts, not improvisation.
You have the binder. Good. Now find Crab. We have a service of process issue, and Crab's skepticism is exactly what we require.

idle_flavor: Procedure is the poetry of the law.
We do not guess in this office. We deduce.
Ensure every form is stamped in triplicate.
